name: Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: One day more
body:
October's deadline is one day away. Friend - can you please chip in $10 or more right now to my campaign for president?

My debate performance on Wednesday night resonated with thousands - if not millions - of Americans. **Fifty-four percent of the debate watchers in the CNBC poll and an overwhelming majority of news accounts indicated I won the debate:**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31343805:sXBK7jyNf:m:1:877327319:CAFEBC41AC5FD3E600E6D683E49FA1C8:r)

Since then, many supporters have reached out and said that _**this is our campaign's moment to rise and succeed**_. I could not agree more, but the road ahead won't be easy unless I have your support.

**We have one day to make that happen.**

[**Your donation before tomorrow's end of month deadline**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31343805:sXBK7jyNf:m:1:877327319:CAFEBC41AC5FD3E600E6D683E49FA1C8:r) will go immediately toward funding the costs of running a national campaign and will ensure Americans hear my strong national security message and plans for our great country.

If you have ever considered supporting our campaign, now is the time to do so. I need to capitalize on the momentum coming off Wednesday's debate, and our campaign must close out October with the strongest fundraising numbers possible.

So, Friend, I'm asking you this: _Can I count on you?_

If the answer is yes, I hope you will [**show your support by making a financial contribution right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31343805:sXBK7jyNf:m:1:877327319:CAFEBC41AC5FD3E600E6D683E49FA1C8:r)

Thank you for your support! The best is yet to come!

Lindsey

PS. I need your help to build on the momentum coming out of Wednesday's debate and take our message to more voters across the country. **Friend, October is quickly coming to a close, and I need your support before it does.** If you agree that we need an experienced and proven leader in the White House, then I hope you will show your support by donating to my campaign right away. [**Please follow this link to donate before tomorrow at midnight.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31343805:sXBK7jyNf:m:1:877327319:CAFEBC41AC5FD3E600E6D683E49FA1C8:r) Thank you.

[** Quick Donate Here >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31343806:sXBK7jyNf:m:1:877327319:CAFEBC41AC5FD3E600E6D683E49FA1C8:r)

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: A blank check to President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

It's been a long week of campaigning and fighting for you -- and with you. First, I wanted to write that I am overwhelmed by the number of people who have stood up with me.

Thank you.

Thank you for standing with me in my race. Thank you for standing with me whenever I stand up to fight Washington. The establishment wanted to sneak this debt ceiling by without a fight.

You didn't let them.

Everywhere you looked, people were writing about the outrage -- that's because of you. Everywhere around Capitol Hill, phones were ringing -- that was you. Your voice is unimaginably important in the fight for liberty.

They may have won this battle, but they won't win this war. Not if you and I keep fighting. They had to fight it in the light of day, and now millions of Americans saw how Washington operates.

Just a few hours ago at 3:00 AM this morning, 65 U.S. Senators from both parties voted to end my filibuster of the disastrous debt ceiling deal.

They voted to give a blank check to President Obama for the rest of his term.

They even voted against my budget point of order attempting to stop them from raiding the social security trust fund to pay for this steaming pile of legislation.

No wonder Congress has a 10% approval rating.

Some of my colleagues joined me in this fight -- and so did you. I heard from people all day long, supporting me for taking a stand. I want to thank you for that.

But I also want to remind you that this battle is not over. It goes on every day here in Congress and it goes on in my fight to win the Presidency.

When will we ever get serious about ending our 18 trillion dollar debt and returning to Constitutional government?

It appears the answer is - not until we have a President who will take on the Washington Machine and make them stop.

The establishment of both parties is addicted to spending \-- and like junkies trying to get their fix, they voted for more spending and more debt this morning at 3:00 AM.

I am not ready to give up this fight. And I know you aren't either.

In fact, this should make us realize how important it really is.

So once again, I ask you to stand with me. Stand against both parties spending us into bankruptcy.

Stand against the Washington Machine raiding Social Security to give President Obama a blank check.

**[Stand against a Congress that won't do the will of the American people](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31340235:siF69jymN:m:1:879035888:1586786528CB90DFA550C4D1F7B04164:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31340236:siF69jymN:m:1:879035888:1586786528CB90DFA550C4D1F7B04164:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

name: Team Katie
subject: The bottom line
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
**Pat Toomey one of the nation 's "most vulnerable senators" \-- _The Hill_**
[**Pitch in today to defeat Toomey >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5819880075641749504/7951688982796959744?refcode=e20151029nd&amount=5)
Friend,

Our end-of-month deadline is just days away, and we are running out of time to hit our critical fundraising goal. **And with the Koch brothers spending to prop up Pat Toomey, we can 't fall short.**

Since our campaign launch, we've received support from Pennsylvanians from all corners of our Commonwealth. But beating an incumbent is no easy task, and we know the deep-pocketed special interests will do whatever it takes to help Toomey hold on. After years in Washington, Pat Toomey has amassed $8 million dollars in his campaign war chest.

We're starting from behind, and we need your support to help close the gap.

subject: Help Get Ted Cruz on the Ballot!
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Did you see this?

Dear Friend,

Thank you all for
your continued work on behalf of the Cruz for President Campaign.
Together we have collected thousands of petition signatures
statewide! Although our efforts have been among the best
volunteer operations in the Commonwealth, we still have work to
do.

As you know, this
coming Tuesday November 3rd is Election Day here in the
Commonwealth. All 140 members of the State Legislature and local
office holders will be on the ballot. This will be a great
opportunity to collect signatures at your local polling location
for our effort to secure Senator Cruz a spot on the Virginia
ballot for the March 1st Republican Presidential Primary.

If you have not done
so, please notify us that you'll commit to working your local
precinct and getting petition signatures on behalf of the Cruz
for President Campaign. If you have not yet committed, but would
like to volunteer please contact us at Virginia@tedcruz.org for
volunteer opportunities in your area.

Click here to
download and print the petition.

The petition must be
printed front and back on one sheet of paper. Prepare a separate
petition page for each locality. The district number should be
entered on each petition page.

Before returning your
completed petition you must get it notarized.

Return your notarized
petition to the address below by Monday Nov. 23rd:

Ted Cruz for Virginia
308B South Main
Street
Box 509
Farmville, VA 23901

Thanks for being a
Courageous Conservative and thank you for all that you are doing
on behalf of this effort.

Best Wishes,

Chris Shores
Ted Cruz for Virginia

P.S. We don't have
much time to get Ted on the ballot in Virginia and your help is
critical. Download the form to ensure Ted is on the ballot in
Virginia.

At 3:00 this morning, 64 U.S. Senators from both parties voted to end my filibuster and raid the Social Security trust fund to give President Obama a blank check for the rest of his term.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: TAKE ACTION → by midnight tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Tomorrow's a big day. First, I can't wait to take the stage at the Florida Democratic Conference. Second, we find out if we hit our October fundraising goal. (And I've got to be honest -- _right now I 'm nervous we won't._)

**Both are important steps in the fight to win back the Senate for the Democrats** , and I need your help to make sure that it happens. As I take the stage, you can set the stage for victory in 2016.

[**I 'm trying to raise $35,000 by midnight tomorrow, and I'm still $7,000 away from reaching it. Contribute what you can right now and make sure we stay on track to hit our goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2111/738133e4/3a19fba7/7f835e8d/703064537/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151030pm?refcode=pme151030pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

As I've said before, the path to turning the Senate blue begins with turning Florida blue. But it's going to be a tough fight filled with attacks from the Koch Brothers, Karl Rove, and right-wing extremist groups.

These groups have not underestimated how much Florida matters in determining the Senate's majority party. **But they have underestimated how much Florida matters to me, to you, and to the hard-working families who live in our beautiful state.**

I'm fighting to get to the Senate so I can protect Medicare, civil liberties, the environment, and our economy. These things are important to the middle class, but they constantly come under siege when Republicans are running the show. It's time to change who's in charge.

[**Let me know you 're committed to taking back the Senate for the Democrats. Contribute $5 or more and make sure we reach our October goal of $35,000.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2111/738133e4/3a19fba7/7f835e8d/703064537/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151030pm?refcode=pme151030pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2111/738133e4/3a19fba7/7f835e8e/703064537/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
